title: Charmants garçons
overview: The charming Lulu, a cabaret singer and dancer, has no shortage of admirers. When she decides to get married, she sets her heart on Robert, a young industrialist, but he is already married. Disappointed, she sets out in search of the ideal man.

trailers.title: CHARMANTS GARÇONS (1957) Bande Annonce VF (HD) de Henri Decoin avec Zizi Jeanmaire, Daniel Gélin
